provisions.title: قررمجلس إدارةمصرفالإماراتالعربيةالمتحدةالمركزيبتاريخ 19يناير 2021:

provisions.content: 1-يعدل اسماللجنة الى"لجنة متابعةإلغاء وإغلاقوسحب رخصالصرافاتالعاملة فيدولةالإماراتالعربيةالمتحدة("اللجنة")؛

provisions.title: 2-تحل "اللجنة"محل اللجنةالدائمةالمشكلةلتصفيةالصرافاتبقرار من مجلسإدارة المصرفالم
provisions.content: 2-تحل "اللجنة"محل اللجنةالدائمةالمشكلةلتصفيةالصرافاتبقرار من مجلسإدارة المصرفالمركزيلدولةالإماراتالعربيةالمتحدة(القرار رقم 51/4/2017)الصادر في 7يونيو2017("لجنةالتصفية")؛

provisions.content: ج-التواصل معالإدارات ذاتالصلة داخلالمصرفالمركزي مثل(ادارة حمايةالمستهلكوإدارةالعملياتالمصرفيةوأنظمة الدفع)للمساعدة فيحل شكاوىالعملاء اوالمطالباتالمستحقةوالمعلقة ضدالصرافة؛ و

provisions.title: د-استكمالالإجراءاتالمتعلقةبإلغاء وحذفاسم الصرافةتحت التصفيةمن سجلالمؤسساتالمالية
provisions.content: د-استكمالالإجراءاتالمتعلقةبإلغاء وحذفاسم الصرافةتحت التصفيةمن سجلالمؤسساتالماليةالمرخصة منقبل المصرفالمركزيوفقاًلقوانينالدولة.

provisions.title: 8-يجب ان يحضرالاجتماعاتالمقررةللجنة ما لايقل عن خمسة (5)أعضاء، كمايجب ان يكونمتو
provisions.content: 8-يجب ان يحضرالاجتماعاتالمقررةللجنة ما لايقل عن خمسة (5)أعضاء، كمايجب ان يكونمتواجداً إماالرئيس اونائبالرئيس.يجب ان تتخذقراراتاللجنةبأغلبيةالحاضرينويجب ان يحتفظالسكرتيربمحاضر جميعالاجتماعات؛

provisions.title: 9-لا يحق لأعضاءاللجنةالحصول على اياجر فيمايتعلقبالمهام التييتم اداؤهاوفقاً للفقر
provisions.content: 9-لا يحق لأعضاءاللجنةالحصول على اياجر فيمايتعلقبالمهام التييتم اداؤهاوفقاً للفقرة 7أعلاه (اي لايتم دفع اي اجربخلافالمستحقاتالمذكورةوفقاً لعقدالعملالمقبول معالمصرفالمركزي)؛

provisions.title: 10-جميع القضاياالتي سبقعرضها علىلجنة التصفيةاو اي لجاناخرى مماثلةستدخل الآن فينط
provisions.content: 10-جميع القضاياالتي سبقعرضها علىلجنة التصفيةاو اي لجاناخرى مماثلةستدخل الآن فينطاق عملاللجنة، تكوناللجنةمسؤولة عنالإشراف علىتصفية جميعالصرافاتالتي هيحالياً تحتالتصفية اوالتي ستطرحللتصفية فيالمستقبل مالم يقرر مجلسإدارة المصرفالمركزي خلافذلك؛

provisions.title: 11-تتشكل وتبدأاللجنةمهامها منتاريخ قرارمجلس الإدارةوينشر القرارفي الجريدةالرسمية
provisions.content: 11-تتشكل وتبدأاللجنةمهامها منتاريخ قرارمجلس الإدارةوينشر القرارفي الجريدةالرسمية.

provisions.title: ThePermanent Committee for the follow up of the cancellation, closure, andwithdr
provisions.content: ThePermanent Committee for the follow up of the cancellation, closure, andwithdrawal of the Licenses of the Exchange Houses operating in the UAE

provisions.title: THEPERMANENT COMMITTEE FOR THE FOLLOW UP OF THE CANCELLATION, CLOSURE, ANDWITHDR
provisions.content: THEPERMANENT COMMITTEE FOR THE FOLLOW UP OF THE CANCELLATION, CLOSURE, ANDWITHDRAWAL, OF THE LICENSES OF THE EXCHANGE HOUSES OPERATING IN THE UAE

provisions.title: Withreference to the Board of Directors Decision No. 23/2/2017 regarding theform
provisions.content: Withreference to the Board of Directors Decision No. 23/2/2017 regarding theformation of a permanent committee for the follow up cancel, withdraw and closelicenses of Exchange houses operating in the country, Board Decision No.51/4/2017 regarding the amendment of Board Decision No. 23/2/2017:

provisions.title: TheBoard of the Central Bank of the UAE has resolved on January 19,2021 :
provisions.content: TheBoard of the Central Bank of the UAE has resolved on January 19,2021 :

provisions.title: 1-The name of Committee shall be amended to "the Committee for the follow up oft
provisions.content: 1-The name of Committee shall be amended to "the Committee for the follow up ofthe cancellation, withdrawal, and closure of the Licenses of the Exchange Housesoperating in the UAE" ("the Committee").

provisions.title: 2-The Committee shall replace the permanent committee formed for the liquidation
provisions.content: 2-The Committee shall replace the permanent committee formed for the liquidationof Exchange Houses via a decision of the Board of the Central Bank of the UAE(Decision No. 51/4/2017 ) issued on7th June 2017 ("the LiquidationCommittee");

provisions.title: 3-The following employees of the Central Bank shall be the members of theCommitt
provisions.content: 3-The following employees of the Central Bank shall be the members of theCommittee:

provisions.title: a-Mr. Abdelrahman Saeed Mohamed Salim Al- Mazrou - Chairman;
provisions.content: a-Mr. Abdelrahman Saeed Mohamed Salim Al- Mazrou - Chairman;

provisions.title: b-Mr. Jamal Ali Abdalla Khalfan A1 Shamsi - Vice Chairman;
provisions.content: b-Mr. Jamal Ali Abdalla Khalfan A1 Shamsi - Vice Chairman;

provisions.title: c-Mohamed Ali Ali Ahmed Ghanem - Member;
provisions.content: c-Mohamed Ali Ali Ahmed Ghanem - Member;

provisions.title: d-Mr. Salem Ahmed Khalil Ahmed Alshirawi A1 Harmi- Member;
provisions.content: d-Mr. Salem Ahmed Khalil Ahmed Alshirawi A1 Harmi- Member;

provisions.title: e-Mr. Abdullah Saeed Nayem Ali Al-Kaabi - Member;
provisions.content: e-Mr. Abdullah Saeed Nayem Ali Al-Kaabi - Member;

provisions.title: f-Mr. Abdullah Saeed Ali Al-Mallahi - Member; and
provisions.content: f-Mr. Abdullah Saeed Ali Al-Mallahi - Member; and

provisions.title: g-Mr. Alex Abraham - Member and Secretary to the Committee.
provisions.content: g-Mr. Alex Abraham - Member and Secretary to the Committee.

provisions.title: 4-The Exchange House under liquidation shall appoint a "Liquidator" (i.e. an aud
provisions.content: 4-The Exchange House under liquidation shall appoint a "Liquidator" (i.e. an auditfirm) acceptable to the Committee in accordance with the requirements of theapplicable laws of the UAE".

provisions.title: 5-The External Auditor of the Exchange House under liquidation shall not beappoi
provisions.content: 5-The External Auditor of the Exchange House under liquidation shall not beappointed as its "Liquidator" under any circumstances;

provisions.title: 6-The Exchange House under liquidation shall be liable to pay the required fees
provisions.content: 6-The Exchange House under liquidation shall be liable to pay the required fees tothe Liquidator;

provisions.title: 7-The Committee shall be entrusted with the following tasks:
provisions.content: 7-The Committee shall be entrusted with the following tasks:

provisions.title: a-Operate the bank accounts (jointly with the Liquidator) required for theliquid
provisions.content: a-Operate the bank accounts (jointly with the Liquidator) required for theliquidation of bank guarantees placed with the Central Bank;

provisions.title: b-Follow-up and supervise the payments made to customers of exchange houses unde
provisions.content: b-Follow-up and supervise the payments made to customers of exchange houses underliquidation by the Liquidator based on the claims received;

provisions.title: c-Communicate with the relevant departments within the Central Bank (such as CPD
provisions.content: c-Communicate with the relevant departments within the Central Bank (such as CPD,BOPS) in order to assist the resolution of customer complaints or outstandingclaims against the Exchange House; and

provisions.title: d-Complete the procedures for cancelling and deleting the name of exchange house
provisions.content: d-Complete the procedures for cancelling and deleting the name of exchange housesunder liquidation from the Register of Financial Institutions licensed by theCentral Bank in accordance with the laws of the country.

provisions.title: 8-A valid meeting of the Committee must be attended by a minimum of five (5)memb
provisions.content: 8-A valid meeting of the Committee must be attended by a minimum of five (5)members; one of them must be either the Chairman or the Vice Chairman. Thedecisions must be taken by the majority of attendees and minutes of all meetingsmust be maintained by the Secretary;

provisions.title: 9-The members of the Committee are not entitled for any remuneration in relation
provisions.content: 9-The members of the Committee are not entitled for any remuneration in relationto tasks performed as per paragraph 7 above (i.e., no remuneration shall be paidother than the normal entitlements as per their accepted employment contractwith the Central Bank);

provisions.title: 10-All cases presented previously to the Liquidation Committee or any other simi
provisions.content: 10-All cases presented previously to the Liquidation Committee or any other similarcommittees will now be coming under the scope of the Committee. The Committeeshall be responsible to oversee the liquidation of all exchange houses that arecurrently under liquidation or those coming up for liquidation in future unlessotherwise decided by the Board of the Central Bank.

provisions.title: 11-The Committee shall be effective from the date of decision of the Board and t
provisions.content: 11-The Committee shall be effective from the date of decision of the Board and theresolution shall be published in the official gazette.

provisions.title: AbdulhamidM. Saeed Alahmadi
provisions.content: AbdulhamidM. Saeed Alahmadi
